title: Rm assert that atmos times isa StepRangeLen

body:
This PR changes the constructors of the various FTS that accept `variable_name` to have a `start_date` and `end_date` keyword argument.

The constructor finds the closest date in the native dates that bound the starting and ending dates and uses the native frequency of the dataset in the FTS (which might differ for different variables, see the difference between tracers and river runoff in JRA55).

The option to build FTS with different frequencies is still available but requires using the constructor with a `Metadata` positional argument instead of a simple symbol.

This PR also introduces a `Metadatum` constructor to differentiate between "single date" dataset and "multiple dates" dataset.
title: Improvements in the `DataWrangling` constructors
Bugfix in the distributed default free surface
